# MIS Institute Management System — Project Overview

**Generated by codebase analysis · Phase 1**

---

## What Is This System?

A web-based academic management platform built for **EPU - MIS Department** (Engineering/IT faculty).
It manages the full student lifecycle: enrollment, attendance, grading, homework, schedules, and files —
across three user roles.

---

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|---|---|
| Language | Python 3.8+ |
| Web Framework | Flask 3.0.0 |
| Database | PostgreSQL (via psycopg v3 + connection pool) |
| Frontend | HTML + Bootstrap 5 + Bootstrap Icons |
| Auth | Werkzeug password hashing + Flask session |
| i18n | Custom `i18n.py` (English, Kurdish, Arabic) |
| File uploads | Local disk (`/uploads/`) |
| Compression | Gzip via `after_request` hook |

---

## User Roles

| Role | Key Capabilities |
|---|---|
| **Superadmin** | Manages majors, all admins — email = `admin@epu.edu.iq` (no major code) |
| **Admin** (Major) | Manages classes, teachers, students, subjects within one major |
| **Teacher** | Attendance, grades, homework, topics, file uploads |
| **Student** | View grades, attendance, homework, schedule, files |

---

## Project File Map


```
MIS/
├── app.py               # App factory — registers blueprints, gzip, i18n context
├── config.py            # ENV-based config (DB, secret key, session timeout)
├── db.py                # ALL database queries (107 KB — monolithic query layer)
├── i18n.py              # Translation engine + Kurdish/Arabic dictionaries (38 KB)
├── init_db.py           # DB initialization script
├── requirements.txt     # 7 dependencies
├── .env / .env.example  # DB credentials + secret key
│
├── blueprints/
│   ├── auth.py          # Login, logout, role decorators, language switch
│   ├── admin.py         # Admin routes (79 KB — largest file)
│   ├── teacher.py       # Teacher routes (40 KB)
│   └── student.py       # Student routes (26 KB)
│
├── templates/
│   ├── base.html        # Master layout (RTL support, Bootstrap, nav)
│   ├── login.html       # Login page
│   ├── admin/           # 24 admin templates
│   ├── teacher/         # 15 teacher templates
│   └── student/         # 8 student templates
│
├── database/
│   ├── schema.sql       # Core schema (10 tables)
│   └── *.sql            # 18 migration patches
│
├── static/css/          # Custom styles
└── uploads/             # User-uploaded files (local disk)
```

---

## Core Database Tables

| Table | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `users` | All accounts (admin/teacher/student) |
| `majors` | Academic department/major |
| `classes` | Year + Semester + Section + Shift combinations |
| `teachers` | Teacher profile linked to user |
| `students` | Student profile linked to user + class |
| `subjects` | Courses per class, with theory & practical teacher |
| `attendance` | Daily per-student, per-subject records |
| `grades` | Multi-type grades (quiz, exam, midterm, final, etc.) |
| `grade_components` | Grading rubric definitions per subject |
| `homework` | Assignments per class/subject |
| `weekly_topics` | Syllabus tracking by week |
| `timetable` | Class schedule |

---
